effect: Hunger recovery is increased, and Energy is recovered scaled to Hunger.
scaling: Level 1: 3% hunger recovery and 3% energy on hunger recovery; level 50: 52% for both.

effect: Logging efficiency increased.
scaling: Extra logging item acquired: 1% at level 1; 17.33% at level 50.

effect: Increased drop rate of strange seeds, and cultivate larger yields.
scaling: Level 1: 3% extra item acquired and 4.5% acquired Magic Seed; level 50: 52% and 76%.

effect: Max health increased.
scaling: Max HP increased: 2% at level 1; 18% at level 25; scaling continues to level 50.

effect: Gathering grass, herbs, or vegetable efficiency increased.
scaling: Item acquired: 1.67% at level 1; 17.67% at level 25.

effect: When full, damage is increased for a short period.
scaling: Damage increased: 7.5% at level 1; 79.5% at level 25.

effect: Cooked food's Health or Energy recovery is increased.
scaling: Level 1: energy 3.33%, HP 2.5%; level 25: energy 35.33%, HP 26.5%.

effect: Allows Fish Traps to catch larger fish.
scaling: Level 1: Fish Trap efficiency 10%, Fish span 50%; level 25: 106% and 530%.

effect: Health recovery is increased upon Resting.
scaling: HP recovery increased: 7% at level 1; 52% at level 10.

effect: Mining efficiency increased.
scaling: Item acquired: 2.33% at level 1; 7.33% at level 4.

effect: Meat and leather drop is increased from hunting.
scaling: Level 1: meat and leather acquisition 0.35%; level 4: 1.1%.

effect: Ranged ATK damage increased, proficient in bow crafting, number of arrows crafted and recovery is increased.
scaling: Level 1: arrow remain 3.5%, arrow production 14%, bow enhancement 10.5%, ranged ATK 4.67%; level 10: 26%, 104%, 78%, 34.67%.

effect: Physical, magic, critical damage is increased.
scaling: CRIT damage increased: 21% at level 1; 156% at level 10.

effect: Wearing light armor increases stealth and Evasion.
scaling: Level 1: EVA 3.5 and Stealth 7; level 10: EVA 26 and Stealth 52.

effect: Decreases energy consumption of Gathering, Logging and Mining.
scaling: Gathering energy consumption decreased: 7% at level 1; 12% at level 2.

effect: When you take damage, recover energy as much as the damage taken of your max health.
scaling: Absorb energy once hit: 12% at level 1; 24% at level 2.

effect: Increased chance to craft better weapons.
scaling: Level 1: enhancement chance 9%, rare item craft chance 8%; level 5: 45% and 40%.

effect: Recovers more Health when character is not starving.
scaling: HP recovery increased 300%; occurrence chance 18% at level 1 through 90% at level 5.

effect: Materials needed to craft an item is decreased.
scaling: Level 1: material reduction chance 12%, max reduction 24%; level 3: 36% and 60%.

effect: Increases bleeding chance when attacking normally.
scaling: Level 1: bleed damage 6%, bleed chance 21%; level 50: 104% and 364%.

effect: Two-handed weapons' damage increased.
scaling: ATK increased: 3% at level 1; 52% at level 50.

effect: Shield Block chance and Shield damage reduction increased.
scaling: Level 1: Shield DEF 6%, shield block chance 1.5%; level 50: 104% and 26%.

effect: Chance of physical damage critical damage is increased.
Chance to stun when attacking.
scaling: Stun occurrence chance: 4% at level 1; 20% at level 5. Stun upon attack: 100%.

effect: Recover Energy from damaging enemies.
scaling: Occurrence chance 12% at level 1 and 24% at level 2; energy recovered 5%.

effect: When an enemy has full health, damage increased.
scaling: Damage increased: 24% at level 1; 72% at level 3.

effect: Successful Shield Block, Parry, or Dodge reduces the next skill's Energy Usage, and the skill cooldown disappears.
scaling: Occurrence chance 12% at level 1, 24% at level 2, 36% at level 3; cooldown reduced 50%.
notes: Wiki labels this entry 'Tactial Totem' in its table of contents.

effect: Start the game with some knowledge about Incantations, and obtain additional Incantations when copying them.
scaling: Incantation identification chance and extra Incantation acquired: 6% at level 1; 104% at level 50.

effect: Increases chance to enchant better attributes.
scaling: Level 1: normal attribute 1.5%, good attributes 2.25%; level 50: 26% and 39%.

effect: When instability is increased, Magic CRIT chance and Magic CRIT DMG is increased.
scaling: Level 1: Magic CRIT damage 15%, Magic CRIT 1; level 50: 260% and 17.33.

effect: Frost Magic DMG is increased. Strong resistance against hot and cold.
scaling: Level 1: heat and cold slower 6%, Frost damage 3%; level 50: 104%, 104%, 52%.

effect: Poison damage is increased. Ignore any negative potion effects, and resistance to poison and illness is increased.
scaling: Level 1: disease and poison resistance 5, ignore bad potion effect 9%, poison damage 5%; level 25: 53, 53, 57%, 53%.

effect: Have a chance of retaining the Incantation recovering Energy.
scaling: Energy recovery 4% and chance of incantation to remain 12% at level 1; 20% and 60% at level 5.

effect: Dark Magic DMG is increased. Your Energy recovery rate is increased in the dark.
scaling: Level 1: Dark damage 12%, extra energy 24%; level 2: 24% and 48%.

effect: Decrease Mana penalty and the chance of strange effect when instability is high.
scaling: Level 1: instability energy use, side effect, and magic failure chance reduced 24%; level 2: 48%.

effect: Absorb partial incoming damage using Energy.
scaling: Level 1: absorbs 20% damage, 27.4% chance, energy -1; level 5: 100%, 37%, -1.
